title: Backend Tracing
description: ClickHouse trace explorer (distributed tracing, OTel → OTel Collector → ClickHouse analytics.otel_traces). Phase 6 (06-02) repointed this dashboard off Tempo onto the ClickHouse datasource (uid aenigma-clickhouse). Both panels are TABLE lists (the Grafana 'traces' viz renders only ONE trace's span waterfall, not a list) — click a TraceId to open that trace's full waterfall/flame-graph in a split Explore view via an internal data link. 'Deepest traces' surfaces the multi-span trace TREES (where the flame graph is interesting); 'Recent slow traces' surfaces slow ROOT spans (often single-span streaming hls-proxy / scraper provider fetches, so their waterfall is one bar — that's expected). Note: most multi-span traces are FAST (<1s) so they only appear in the Deepest panel, not the slow one. Cross-service linkage (gateway→catalog/player/auth/…) works; deeper-than-2-service trees are rare. Use 'Services / Overview' (animeenigma-services) for RED metrics; use this to drill into individual traces.

panels.title: Deepest traces (most spans) — click a TraceId for the flame graph

query.rawSql: WITH '${__value.raw}' as trace_id, (SELECT min(Start) FROM "otel_traces_trace_id_ts" WHERE TraceId = trace_id) as trace_start, (SELECT max(End) + 1 FROM "otel_traces_trace_id_ts" WHERE TraceId = trace_id) as trace_end SELECT "TraceId" as traceID, "SpanId" as spanID, "ParentSpanId" as parentSpanID, "ServiceName" as serviceName, "SpanName" as operationName, "Timestamp" as startTime, multiply("Duration", 0.000001) as duration, arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', "SpanAttributes"[key]), mapKeys("SpanAttributes")) as tags, arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', "ResourceAttributes"[key]), mapKeys("ResourceAttributes")) as serviceTags FROM "otel_traces" WHERE traceID = trace_id AND startTime >= trace_start AND startTime <= trace_end AND Duration > 0 ORDER BY Timestamp DESC, Duration DESC LIMIT 2000

targets.rawSql: SELECT TraceId AS traceID, anyIf(ServiceName, ParentSpanId='') AS serviceName, anyIf(SpanName, ParentSpanId='') AS operationName, count() AS spans, minIf(Timestamp, ParentSpanId='') AS startTime, maxIf(Duration, ParentSpanId='')/1000000 AS duration FROM analytics.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY TraceId HAVING spans > 1 ORDER BY spans DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Recent slow traces (>1s) — click a TraceId for the waterfall

query.rawSql: WITH '${__value.raw}' as trace_id, (SELECT min(Start) FROM "otel_traces_trace_id_ts" WHERE TraceId = trace_id) as trace_start, (SELECT max(End) + 1 FROM "otel_traces_trace_id_ts" WHERE TraceId = trace_id) as trace_end SELECT "TraceId" as traceID, "SpanId" as spanID, "ParentSpanId" as parentSpanID, "ServiceName" as serviceName, "SpanName" as operationName, "Timestamp" as startTime, multiply("Duration", 0.000001) as duration, arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', "SpanAttributes"[key]), mapKeys("SpanAttributes")) as tags, arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', "ResourceAttributes"[key]), mapKeys("ResourceAttributes")) as serviceTags FROM "otel_traces" WHERE traceID = trace_id AND startTime >= trace_start AND startTime <= trace_end AND Duration > 0 ORDER BY Timestamp DESC, Duration DESC LIMIT 2000

targets.rawSql: SELECT TraceId AS traceID, ServiceName AS serviceName, SpanName AS operationName, Timestamp AS startTime, Duration / 1000000 AS duration FROM analytics.otel_traces WHERE ParentSpanId = '' AND Duration > 1000000000 AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
